mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INTEGRATED_HISTORY WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND ACTIVITY_TYPE LIKE #{typePrefix} || '%' AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT Q.* FROM QUIZ Q JOIN INTEGRATED_HISTORY H ON Q.QUIZ_NO = H.REF_ID WHERE H.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND H.ACTIVITY_TYPE = #{activityType} AND H.STATUS = 'P' AND TRUNC(H.CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY H.HISTORY_ID ASC

SELECT Q.*, CASE WHEN H.STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as completed FROM QUEST Q JOIN INTEGRATED_HISTORY H ON Q.QUEST_NO = H.REF_ID WHERE H.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND H.ACTIVITY_TYPE = 'QUEST' AND TRUNC(H.CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY H.HISTORY_ID ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM INTEGRATED_HISTORY WHERE STATUS = 'P' AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INTEGRATED_HISTORY WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND ACTIVITY_TYPE = 'QUEST' AND REF_ID = #{questNo} AND STATUS = 'Y' AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
